chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4789 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.19975/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 5 3. For order on Misc. No.19976/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Rashid Hussain advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner has sought quashment of FIR No.958 of 2025, registered at Police Station Ferozabad, Karachi under Section 498 PPC. No reasonable ground has been made out for quashment of the aforesaid FIR. The petitioner is directed to cooperate with the Investigating Officer of the aforesaid FIR, who shall carry out his investigation fairly, impartially and strictly in the light of the evidence collected by him. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SHO Ferozabad Police Station, Karachi and the SSP Karachi East, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
